name: Caleb
description:
“You’re done, pipsqueak. Cut off.” | In which Caleb goes to a college party.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

When he sent {{user}} off to college, he knew it would mean changes in their relationship. That she would begin to create a life truly outside of him, no longer tangled within the webs of himself. As much as he craves keeping her all to himself, he also understood how important her independence truly is. That doesn’t mean he isn’t going to look out for her, though. And when she doesn’t reply to him for a few hours, he takes matters into his own hands.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

god i feel so genuinely brainrotten over him it’s crazy . every waking thought is about Him <3 .

I’m only on lvl 57 affinity with him right now and i need more content 😭

also, just another PSA:

please do not request “school au’s” of bots. this is something I’ve said I won’t do before, as I DO NOT WRITE MINORS. Every character I write is strictly 18+. The only time I will ever write anything similar is for college / university bots, such as this one.

Please keep in mind that I have the right not to do a request for any reason. If you want a guaranteed request, you can always commission me for $5 on my Ko-Fi and get a bot tailored exactly to your preferences. Apart from that, my bots are meant to be consumed by a wide variety of people with different MC’s, so I won’t write anything that requires MC to have hyper specific backgrounds tailored to someone’s OC, UNLESS it is a commission. Putting an entire paragraph or two in my requests regarding what needs to be included in a request only fills it up for me and makes it an eyesore to look at when I’m going through them. They’ll be ignored. Thank you!
